历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 8747 → 9103 → 13261 → 11037 → 10556, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing. A significant drop occurred in 2023 (13261), with recovery in the following two years, and the baseline for 2025 is approximately 10556. Enrollment plans for this university in Chongqing's Physics Category were 57 in 2021–2022, 55 in 2023, 56 in 2024, and increased to 68 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 69, a slight expansion of 1 person (about 1.5%) compared to 2025, which has a minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable range of 38–40 in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 985 group. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly due to humanistic stories such as a master's graduate thanking the security department for allowing a garbage collector to enter the campus, showcasing campus warmth. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranks 53rd (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, and application attention steadily rising. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Ecology and Grass Science, A- in Chemistry, Geography, and Biology, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above. Grass Science and Ecology are top nationally, while basic disciplines like Chemistry and Biology are strong, providing strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular, while medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology maintain stable popularity. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing for 2026 is about 137,000, slightly down from 139,000 in 2025, easing competition pressure. The 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu, far from Chongqing, requiring cross-province study. Its enrollment plan in Chongqing is relatively small (about 68–69 people), so geographical preference has limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10556, the 2026 plan expansion of only 1 person, a slight decrease in total examinees, and a slightly positive reputation, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly decrease (increase in number) compared to 2025, estimated at 10679, with a range of 10179–11179.

Rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<10179) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
